# Pagesmith - Full LLM Reference

Pagesmith is a file-based CMS centered on `@pagesmith/content`.

## Package Layout

- `@pagesmith/content`: collections, loaders, validation, lazy rendering, diagramkit integration, AI installer APIs
- `@pagesmith/core`: markdown pipeline, JSX runtime, runtime CSS exports
- `pagesmith`: optional SSG built on top of the content layer

## Core APIs

- `defineCollection(...)`
- `defineConfig(...)`
- `createContentLayer(config)`
- `layer.getCollection(name)`
- `layer.getEntry(collection, slug)`
- `layer.validate()`
- `layer.renderDiagrams()`
- `entry.render()`

## Diagram Handling

Pagesmith delegates diagram rendering and manifests to `diagramkit`.

CLI:

```bash
pagesmith-content diagrams content/
pagesmith-content diagrams content/ --watch
pagesmith-content diagrams content/ --type drawio
```

## Assistant Installs

CLI:

```bash
pagesmith-content ai install --assistant all --scope project
```

API:

```ts
import { installAiArtifacts } from '@pagesmith/content/ai'

installAiArtifacts({
  assistants: ['claude', 'codex', 'gemini'],
  scope: 'project',
})
```

Installed project files:

- `CLAUDE.md`
- `AGENTS.md`
- `GEMINI.md`
- `.claude/commands/pagesmith.md`
- `.codex/skills/pagesmith/SKILL.md`
- `.gemini/commands/pagesmith.toml`
- `llms.txt`
- `llms-full.txt`
